# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline 
on: [push] # Set to receive events on specified event(like push, pull request)  
jobs:
    build_job1:
        runs-on: ubuntu-latest      # Use the latest version of Ubuntu for job execution. Replace with your preferred OS if necessary    
         name: Build Artifacts       # Define a new Job – 'Build' artifact that will contain all required files  
          steps:                      # Array containing multiple commands to execute in sequence   
           - uses: actions/checkout@v2     
             with:                   # Specifies the version of action and repository from where script should be run (Replace these according your needs) 
               repo_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}     # Pass a token to prove that GitHub Actions runner is authenticated   
               fetch-depth: 0            # By default, the depth of repository content doesn't affect pull requests  
           - name: Install Dependencies          # Executes multiple shell commands on your job host OS       
             run: |                        
              npm install                   # Add any Node packages you need to use in this 'npm安装命令’. Replace with necessary scripts or tools if needed 
           - name: Build                     # Defines a new Job    ‘Build' that will compile the source code (replace as per your project setup)      
             run: |                        
              npm build                   # Run any Node package building commands here such as 'npm构建命令'. Replace with necessary scripts or tools if needed  
           - name: Artifacts                 # Defines a new Job for archiving the output artifact     
             uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2 
               with:                     # Define file to upload and path where it should be placed in repo. Replace as per your requirements   
                name: 'Build'                 
                path: './build/*'                   
           
           - name: Deployment                 # Defines a new Job for deployment       
             runs-on: ubuntu-latest        
             needs: build_job1               # Assigns the job as dependency of this ‘Deploy’ to wait its success    
             steps:                          # Array containing multiple commands before executing next step     
              - name: Download Artifact         
                run :|                            #Download artifact from previous 'Build' Job   
                  npm install                   # Install any needed node package for deployment  
                  ${{ secrets.ARTIFACT_PATH }}  """Copy the path of your downloaded build file here"""    
              - name: Execute Deployment Scripts       
                run :|                            #Execute all scripts in given directory after downloading artifact   
                  npm deploy                    # Use appropriate Node package for deployment (like 'npm部署命令' if any)   ”Copy the script to be executed here“
